<Card>
  <Column>
    <Image size="medium" shape="square" src="qrcode" />
    <Text variant="heading">扫码下载</Text>

    <Row>
      <Button variant="secondary" onTap="saveQRCode">保存图片</Button>
      <Button variant="primary" onTap="shareQRCode">分享</Button>
    </Row>
  </Column>
</Card>
